description_long: This is a round cake with a smooth, wavy white icing covering its entire exterior and top surface. A large wedge has been cut out, revealing three distinct layers of deep red sponge separated by thin layers of white cream or frosting. The cake's surface is free of any additional decorations, giving it a minimalist and clean appearance. The texture of the icing appears slightly rippled, suggesting a hand-applied finish. The interior layers are moist and dense, with the red color strongly contrasting the white icing. No candles or decorative elements are present, and the cake is not displayed on any visible container or stand.
description: A round cake with wavy white icing and three visible red sponge layers, featuring a large cut-out wedge and a minimalist, undecorated style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cake with a large wedge removed, clearly displaying the three red sponge layers and white cream filling.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the exposed interior layers and the thick, wavy white icing on the exterior.
description_view_2: The back view shows the cake's uncut, continuous white-iced surface with no visible interior layers.
description_view_3: This rear angle displays the smooth, rippled white icing and the absence of any cut or exposed interior.
